title: Outcome
description: An Outcome describes what changes when a Capability successfully executes — state transitions, derived updates, and side effects like notifications or downstream capabilities.

capability.description: The Capability this outcome applies to, expressed as Resource.Action.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this outcome produces.

changes.description: Attribute changes applied to the Resource after the capability executes.

set.description: The value to assign. Use 'now' for the current timestamp.

initiates.description: Downstream capabilities to initiate after this capability completes (intra-domain, synchronous).

emits.description: Signal names published when this outcome completes (cross-domain, asynchronous). Each entry must reference a Signal defined in the signals array.
